description: An analyst needs to create a new live dashboard in a tool like Google Data Studio to track key campaign metrics.

nodes.task_description: Connect the dashboarding tool to the necessary data sources (Google Ads, Google Analytics).

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully establishes the data connections.

nodes.task_description: Create visualizations (scorecards, time-series charts, tables) for key metrics like Spend, Clicks, and Conversions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent builds a dashboard with clear and relevant charts.

nodes.task_description: Add filters to the dashboard to allow users to view data by date range and campaign.

expected_outcome.value: Agent adds interactive controls to the dashboard.
